# Third-party dependencies

Vendored as single-header releases, kept under their original licenses (see
each subdirectory's `LICENSE` / `LICENSE.txt`).

## xxHash

- Source: https://github.com/Cyan4973/xxHash
- Version: v0.8.2
- License: BSD-2-Clause (see `xxhash/LICENSE`)
- Used as: header-only, compiled with `XXH_INLINE_ALL`

## doctest

- Source: https://github.com/doctest/doctest
- Version: v2.4.11
- License: MIT (see `doctest/LICENSE.txt`)
- Used as: header-only test framework
